verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Living in this world of insanity We're surrounded by the dead, They are all asleep But under this to see, thank God I'm quickened and awakened Now the master is here, the Son is risen He's no longer the hidden Messiah But He has a plan Now to the promise of the second coming I'm looking ahead

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'm looking ahead, to that glorious city Where I'll shake the hands of those gone on before me I can still feel the same tender hand that's carrying me Will lead me home, So Lord I'm looking ahead

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So many among us are hurting, They're wounded in the battle Lord they're dying Brothers stick to each other's hands, sisters do the same Lift each other and prayer we will make it through And those skin worms destroy this body I got another one waiting for me So Lord fill my soul with your Holy Ghost Cleanse me and make me whole
